title: ivesia baileyi var. beneolens
intro: Ivesia baileyi var. beneolens, also known as Bailey's rockcress, is a plant species in the mustard family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Ivesia baileyi var. beneolens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
